title: GraphBit: A Graph-based Agentic Framework for Non-Linear Agent Orchestration
summary: GraphBit: A Graph-based Agentic Framework for Non-Linear Agent Orchestration
whyItMatters: Agentic LLM frameworks that rely on prompted orchestration, where the model itself determines workflow transitions, often suffer from hallucinated routing, infinite loops, and non-reproducible execution. We introduce GraphBit, an engine-orchestrated framework that defines workflows explicitly and deterministically as a directed acyclic graph (DAG). Unlike p…
